arts.ttl: Bournemouth defender Max Aarons in talks with Spanish giants over loan deal with £7.5m buy option after interest from across Europe in former Norwich right back
arts.sum: SIMON JONES: Mail Sport revealed this week that the former England U21 international would be allowed to leave amid interest from foreign clubs with a Spanish giant among them.

arts.ttl: Transfer news and rumours: Philip Billing to Napoli, Max Aarons to Valencia, Hamza Choudhury to Sheffield United

arts.ttl: Bournemouth manager Andoni Iraola set to offload first-team player this month
arts.sum: Bournemouth manager Andoni Iraola has reportedly made the decision to offload right-back Max Aarons this January transfer window, with a loan move now on the cards. arts.ttl: Done Deal: Billing to Napoli from Bournemouth, Forolunsho for Fiorentina

arts.ttl: The new training ground built to match Bournemouth's ambition
arts.sum: Kelly Somers meets Bournemouth head coach Andoni Iraola and fomer captain Simon Francis, now first-team technical director, for a tour of the Cherries' state-of-the-art new training facility which opens soon.

arts.ttl: Napoli Surprise with the Arrival of Philip Billing from Bournemouth
arts.sum: In a surprising turn of events, Napoli are set to welcome Philip Billing as their new midfielder, arriving from Premier League club Bournemouth. Under the management of Antonio Conte, Napoli have been one of the most active teams in the current transfer window, and this acquisition is aimed at strengthening their squad.
